sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90609" key="prou+peu/qunos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προϋπ-εύθῡνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n90609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">previously subject</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">liable</tr_>, c. dat., Keil-Premerstein <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Dritter Bericht</tr_> No.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(ii/iii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
